从脑后一个棒球大小的水疱中凸出：《天才之岛》，达罗德·特雷弗特著，金斯利出版社，2010 年，第 120–122 页。



rushing off to a golf game: The Real Rain Man. Documentary by Focus Productions. Bristol, England, 2006.

匆匆赶去参加高尔夫球赛：《雨人真实故事》，焦点制作公司纪录片，英国布里斯托尔，2006 年。



John Langdon Down, the superintendent of the Royal Earlswood Asylum: Mental Disability in Victorian England: The Earlswood Asylum, 1847–1901, David Wright, Oxford, Oxford University Press, 2000.

皇家厄尔斯伍德精神病院院长约翰·朗顿·唐：《维多利亚时代英格兰的精神残障：厄尔斯伍德精神病院，1847–1901》，大卫·赖特著，牛津大学出版社，2000 年。



“many examples of children who had spoken well and with understanding but who lost speech”: “Dr. J. Langdon Down and ‘Developmental’ Disorders,” Darold Treffert, Wisconsin Medical Society, https://www.wisconsinmedicalsociety.org/professional/savant-syndrome/resources/articles/dr-j-landon-down-and-developmental-disorders/

“许多曾能清晰且有理解力地说话，但后来失去语言能力的儿童案例”：“J. Langdon Down 博士与‘发育性’障碍”，Darold Treffert，威斯康星医学会，https://www.wisconsinmedicalsociety.org/professional/savant-syndrome/resources/articles/dr-j-landon-down-and-developmental-disorders/



“Shakespeare would have cared!”: Islands of Genius, p. 126.

“莎士比亚会在意的！”：《天才的孤岛》，第 126 页。



he listed his occupation on tax forms as “typist”: Barry Morrow, personal communication.

他在纳税申报单上将职业填写为“打字员”：Barry Morrow，个人通讯。



“could evolve into a film classic”: UA-Project “coverage” of the original Rain Man script, Anne Brand. Courtesy of Barry Morrow, Sept. 18, 1986.

“可能成为一部电影经典”：UA-Project 对《雨人》原始剧本的“评估报告”，Anne Brand。经 Barry Morrow 许可，1986 年 9 月 18 日。



to “live truthfully”: “Before They Were Kings,” Richard Meryman, Vanity Fair, March 2004.

“真实地生活”：理查德·梅里曼，《名利场》，2004 年 3 月，《他们成为国王之前》。



To cultivate his French accent: Ibid.

为培养他的法语口音：同上。



(The technique was introduced to America . . .): “Electric Shock, a New Treatment,” Marjorie Van de Water. Science News-Letter, Vol. 38, No. 3, July 20, 1940, pp. 42–44.

（该技术被引入美国……）：《电击，一种新疗法》，玛乔丽·范·德·沃特。《科学新闻快报》，第 38 卷，第 3 期，1940 年 7 月 20 日，第 42–44 页。



“All my life I had wanted to get inside a prison or a mental hospital”: “Playboy Interview: Dustin Hoffman,” Richard Meryman. Playboy, Vol. 22, No. 4, 1975.

“我一生都想进入监狱或精神病院”：《花花公子访谈：达斯汀·霍夫曼》，理查德·梅里曼。《花花公子》，第 22 卷，第 4 期，1975 年。



“I can’t, I caaan’t!”: “Tales of Hoffman,” Hendrik Hertzberg. New Yorker, Jan. 21, 2013.

“我做不到，我真的做不到！”：《霍夫曼的故事》，亨德里克·赫茨伯格，《纽约客》，2013 年 1 月 21 日。



He believed that treating the subject of developmental disability: “Barry Levinson: Making Out Like Bandits,” Alex Simon. Venice, Oct. 2001.

他认为探讨发展障碍这一主题：《巴里·莱文森：大赚一笔》，亚历克斯·西蒙，《威尼斯》，2001 年 10 月。



as his brothers and sisters unwrapped their gifts: “Dustin and Me,” Sherri Dalfonse. Washingtonian, July 1992.

当他的兄弟姐妹们拆开礼物时：《达斯汀与我》，谢里·达尔方斯，《华盛顿人》，1992 年 7 月。



A decade before most people thought about buying a personal computer: Ibid.

在大多数人考虑购买个人电脑的十年前：同上。



“People began treating him more seriously”: Kevin Guthrie, interview with the author, 2014.

“人们开始更认真地对待他”：凯文·格思里，2014 年与作者的访谈。



“All of that stuff came from me”: Gail Mutrux, interview with the author, 2014.

“所有那些东西都来自我”：盖尔·穆特鲁克斯，2014 年与作者的访谈。



“We just made a film that will play for a month or two”: “Rain Man, the Movie/Rain Man, Real Life,” Darold Treffert. https://www.wisconsinmedicalsociety.org/professional/savant-syndrome/resources/articles/rain-man-the-movie-rain-man-real-life/

“我们只是拍了一部能上映一两个月的电影”：《雨人，电影/雨人，真实人生》，达罗德·特雷弗特。https://www.wisconsinmedicalsociety.org/professional/savant-syndrome/resources/articles/rain-man-the-movie-rain-man-real-life/



one of NSAC’s co-founders: “‘Rain Man’ validates the feelings of many touched by autism,” Sue Reilly. Los Angeles Daily News, Jan. 15, 1989.

NSAC 的联合创始人之一：《〈雨人〉验证了许多受孤独症影响者的感受》，苏·赖利。《洛杉矶每日新闻》，1989 年 1 月 15 日。



“We’re always keeping a lid on our own autism”: “The Real Press Junket,” Edward Guthmann. San Francisco Chronicle, July 15, 2001.

“我们总是对自己的孤独谱系特质讳莫如深”：出自爱德华·古斯曼《真实的新闻发布会》，《旧金山纪事报》，2001 年 7 月 15 日。



“It seems that Rain Man has stimulated almost every newspaper and magazine in the country”: “Rain Man and the Savants’ Secrets,” Bernard Rimland. Autism Research Review International, Vol. 2 No. 3, 1988.

“《雨人》似乎激发了全国几乎所有报纸和杂志的报道热情”：出自伯纳德·里姆兰《雨人与天才的秘密》，《孤独症研究国际评论》，1988 年第 2 卷第 3 期。



“virtually unheard of among autistic people”: “Dustin and Me.”

“在孤独谱系群体中几乎闻所未闻”：出自《达斯汀与我》。



more than a million people a year: “Joseph’s Story.” Autism Services Center. http://www.autismservicescenter.org/about/josephs_story

每年超过一百万人：出自《约瑟夫的故事》，孤独症服务中心。http://www.autismservicescenter.org/about/josephs_story



CHAPTER 10. PANDORA’S BOX

第十章 潘多拉魔盒



“I have felt like Pandora”: “Past and Future Research on Asperger Syndrome,” Lorna Wing. Asperger Syndrome, A. Klin, F. Volkmar, and S. Sparrow, eds. Guildford Press, 2000, p. 418.

“我感觉自己就像潘多拉”：出自《阿斯伯格综合征的过去与未来研究》，洛娜·温著，收录于《阿斯伯格综合征》，A.克林、F.沃尔克玛、S.斯帕罗编，吉尔福德出版社，2000 年，第 418 页。



“I just didn’t know what the hell to do”: “The Dictionary of Disorder,” Alix Spiegel. New Yorker, Jan. 3, 2005.

“我当时完全不知道该怎么办”：出自《紊乱词典》，阿利克斯·施皮格尔著，《纽约客》，2005 年 1 月 3 日。



“Compared to other types of [medical] services there is less clarity”: The Making of DSM-III: A Diagnostic Manual’s Conquest of American Psychiatry, Hannah S. Decker. Oxford University Press, 2013, p. 27.

“与其他类型的[医疗]服务相比，其清晰度较低”：出自《DSM-III 的诞生：一本诊断手册如何征服美国精神病学》，汉娜·S.德克尔著，牛津大学出版社，2013 年，第 27 页。



“I share a congressional consensus”: “DSM-III and the Transformation of American Psychiatry: A History,” M. Wilson. American Journal of Psychiatry, Vol. 150, No. 3, March 1993, pp. 399–410.

“我分享国会共识”：《DSM-III 与美国精神病学的转型：一段历史》，M.威尔逊著，《美国精神病学杂志》，第 150 卷，第 3 期，1993 年 3 月，第 399–410 页。



“Our adversaries are not demons, witches, fate, or mental illness”: The Myth of Mental Illness, Thomas Szasz. Harper & Row, 1961.

“我们的对手不是恶魔、女巫、命运或精神疾病”：《精神疾病的神话》，托马斯·萨斯著，哈珀与罗出版社，1961 年。



“data-oriented people”: “The Dictionary of Disorder.”

“以数据为导向的人”：《混乱词典》。



“He doesn’t understand people’s emotions”: Ibid.

“他不理解他人的情感”：同上。



One clinic reported only a single child: “A Comparison of Schizophrenic and Autistic Children,” W. H. Green, M. Campbell, et al. Journal of the American Academy of Child and Adolescent Psychiatry, Vol. 23, No. 4, July 1984, 399–409.

一家诊所仅报告了一名儿童病例：《精神分裂症与孤独谱系儿童之比较》，W. H. 格林、M. 坎贝尔等人著，《美国儿童与青少年精神病学学会期刊》，第 23 卷第 4 期，1984 年 7 月，第 399–409 页。



DSM-III “looks very scientific”: Robert Spitzer, quoted in The Book of Woe: The DSM and the Unmaking of Psychiatry, Gary Greenberg. Blue Rider Press, 2013, p. 41.

DSM-III“看起来非常科学”：罗伯特·斯皮策语，引自《苦难之书：DSM 与精神医学的解构》，加里·格林伯格著，蓝骑士出版社，2013 年，第 41 页。



“I’ll call a kid a zebra”: Unstrange Minds, Roy Richard Grinker. Basic Books, 2008, p. 131.

“我会把一个孩子称为斑马”：《陌生的心灵》，罗伊·理查德·格林克著，基础读物出版社，2008 年，第 131 页。



280,000 copies in its first two years alone: The Physiology of Psychological Disorders, James G. Hollandworth. Springer, 1990, p. 17.

仅前两年就售出 28 万册：《心理障碍的生理学》，詹姆斯·G·霍兰德沃斯著，斯普林格出版社，1990 年，第 17 页。



“Autism should no longer be conceptualized as an extremely rare disorder”: “Autism: Not an Extremely Rare Disorder,” Christopher Gillberg, Lorna Wing. Acta Psychiatrica Scandinavica, Vol. 99, 1999, pp. 399–406.

“孤独症不应再被视作一种极为罕见的障碍”：“孤独症：并非极为罕见的障碍”，克里斯托弗·吉尔伯格、洛娜·温。《斯堪的纳维亚精神病学学报》，第 99 卷，1999 年，第 399–406 页。



an unusually colorful pediatrician in London who founded a magazine: “Ambitious Outsider: An Interview with Ambit Editor Martin Bax,” 3 A.M., 2002.

一位在伦敦创办杂志、风格异常多彩的儿科医生：“雄心勃勃的局外人：专访《雄心》编辑马丁·巴克斯”，《凌晨三点》，2002 年。



In the 1970s he had written a dystopian novel: The Hospital Ship, Martin Bax. New Directions, 1976.

1970 年代，他写了一部反乌托邦小说：《医院船》，马丁·巴克斯著。新方向出版社，1976 年。



a comprehensive analysis of the Family Fund database: “Market for Disabled Children’s Services—A Review.” PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP, 2006.

对家庭基金数据库的全面分析：“残疾儿童服务市场——一项评估”。普华永道会计师事务所，2006 年。



By the 1990s, however, referral to a specialist: “Autistic Spectrum Disorders,” Lorna Wing. British Medical Journal, Feb. 10, 1996.

然而到了 20 世纪 90 年代，转诊至专科医生的情况发生了变化：《孤独谱系障碍》，洛娜·温著，《英国医学杂志》，1996 年 2 月 10 日。



The new IDEA rules also required schools to comply: “Three Reasons Not to Believe in an Autism Epidemic,” Morton Ann Gernsbacher, Michelle Dawson, and H. Hill Goldsmith. Current Directions in Psychological Science, Vol. 14, No. 2, Apr. 2005.

新 IDEA 规则还要求学校遵守：《不相信孤独症流行的三个理由》，莫顿·安·根斯巴赫尔、米歇尔·道森和 H·希尔·戈德史密斯著，《心理科学当前方向》，第 14 卷第 2 期，2005 年 4 月。



Simultaneously, the first standardized clinical instruments: “Psychometric Instruments Available for the Assessment of Autistic Children,” Susan L. Parks. Diagnosis and Assessment of Autism, Eric Schopler and Gary Mesibov, eds. Plenum Press, 1988, pp. 123–36.

与此同时，首批标准化临床评估工具问世：《可用于孤独症儿童评估的心理测量工具》，苏珊·L·帕克斯著，《孤独症的诊断与评估》，埃里克·肖普勒和加里·梅西博夫编，普莱纽姆出版社，1988 年，第 123-136 页。



Before the 1980s, autistic kids were generally considered “untestable”: “The Anatomy of a Negative Role Model,” Eric Schopler. The Undaunted Psychiatrist: Adventures in Research, Gary Brannagan and Matthew Merrens. McGraw-Hill, 1993, p. 182.

在 20 世纪 80 年代之前，孤独症儿童通常被认为"无法进行测试"：《负面角色模型的剖析》，埃里克·肖普勒著，《无畏的精神病学家：研究探险》，加里·布拉纳根和马修·梅伦斯编，麦格劳-希尔出版社，1993 年，第 182 页。



a child’s score could vary widely depending on which parent filled in the checklist: “An Experience with the Rimland Checklist for Autism,” Aubrey W. Metcalfe. Clinical Studies in Childhood Psychoses, S. A. Szurek and I. N. Berlin, eds. Brunner/Mazel, 1973, pp. 469–70.

一个孩子的得分可能因填写检查表的父母不同而差异很大：《使用 Rimland 孤独症检查表的经验》，Aubrey W. Metcalfe 著。《儿童精神病临床研究》，S. A. Szurek 与 I. N. Berlin 编，Brunner/Mazel 出版社，1973 年，第 469–470 页。



Rimland refused to publish his scoring key: “Psychometric Instruments Available for the Assessment of Autistic Children,” Susan L. Parks. Diagnosis and Assessment of Autism, Eric Schopler and Gary Mesibov, eds. Plenum Press: New York and London, 1988, pp. 123–36.

Rimland 拒绝公布其评分标准：《可用于评估孤独谱系儿童的心理测量工具》，Susan L. Parks 著。《孤独谱系的诊断与评估》，Eric Schopler 与 Gary Mesibov 编，Plenum Press 出版社：纽约与伦敦，1988 年，第 123–136 页。



which was particularly good at distinguishing autism: A History of Autism, p. 177.

该工具在区分孤独谱系方面尤为有效：《孤独谱系的历史》，第 177 页。



Schopler believed that an approach to autism that took into account: “The Anatomy of a Negative Role Model,” p. 183.

Schopler 认为，一种考虑全面的孤独谱系干预方法：《负面角色模型的剖析》，第 183 页。



After reading the manual and watching a thirty-minute video: The Autism Matrix, p. 235.

阅读手册并观看三十分钟视频后：《孤独谱系矩阵》，第 235 页。



As a result, it became wildly popular: A History of Autism, p. 177.

因此，它变得极为流行：《孤独症历史》，第 177 页。



“Fifty percent of the autistic population are mute”: “Speech and Language Acquisition and Intervention: Behavioral Approaches,” Marjorie Charlop and Linda Haymes. Autism in Children and Adults, Johnny Matson, ed. Brooks/Cole, 1994, p. 213.

“百分之五十的孤独谱系人群无法言语”：《言语与语言习得及干预：行为方法》，作者马乔丽·查洛普与琳达·海姆斯。《儿童与成人中的孤独症》，约翰尼·马森编。布鲁克斯/科尔出版社，1994 年，第 213 页。



The first international conference on Asperger’s: The Complete Guide to Asperger’s Syndrome, Tony Attwood. Kingsley, 2006, p. 36.

首届阿斯伯格综合征国际会议：《阿斯伯格综合征完全指南》，托尼·阿特伍德。金斯利出版社，2006 年，第 36 页。



“Odd and unusual behaviors do not, in and of themselves, constitute a ‘disorder’”: “Clinical Case Conference: Asperger’s Disorder,” Fred R. Volkmar and Ami Klin. American Journal of Psychiatry, Vol. 157, 2000, pp. 262–67.

“怪异和异常的行为本身并不构成‘障碍’”：出自《临床案例讨论：阿斯伯格障碍》，弗雷德·R·沃尔克马尔与阿米·克林，《美国精神病学杂志》，第 157 卷，2000 年，第 262–67 页。



Consider Robert Edwards, an eleven-year-old boy: Ibid.

以十一岁男孩罗伯特·爱德华兹为例：同上。



“As I explain to parents, the cure for Asperger’s syndrome is very simple”: Tony Attwood, personal communication, 2014.

“正如我向家长解释的那样，阿斯伯格综合征的‘治愈’方法非常简单”：托尼·阿特伍德，个人通讯，2014 年。



“It was a crazy problem”: Unpublished segment of Volkmar interview with Gary Greenberg for The Book of Woe, March 1, 2012.

“这真是个疯狂的问题”：摘自沃尔克马尔对加里·格林伯格未公开的采访片段，用于《苦难之书》，2012 年 3 月 1 日。



DSM-IV casebooks, study guides, videotapes, and software: For example, DSM-IV Videotaped Clinical Vignettes, Vols. 1 and 2, William Reed, Michael Wise. Brunner/Mazel Studios.

DSM-IV 案例手册、学习指南、录像带及软件：例如《DSM-IV 临床案例录像集》第 1、2 卷，威廉·里德、迈克尔·怀斯著，Brunner/Mazel 工作室出版。



a small but crucial error: Unstrange Minds, Roy Richard Grinker. Basic Books, 2008, p. 140.

一个微小但关键的失误：《不陌生的心灵》，罗伊·理查德·格林克著，基础图书出版社，2008 年，第 140 页。



a notably understated article in an obscure journal: “The DSM-IV Text Revision: Rationale and Potential Impact on Clinical Practice,” Michael B. First and Harold Alan Pincus. Psychiatric Services, Vol. 53, No. 3, March 2002.

一篇发表于冷门期刊、措辞极为克制的文章：《DSM-IV 文本修订：理论依据及对临床实践的潜在影响》，迈克尔·B·弗斯特与哈罗德·艾伦·平卡斯合著，《精神科服务》期刊，第 53 卷第 3 期，2002 年 3 月。



By reanalyzing the field-test data: Ibid.

通过重新分析现场测试数据：同上。



a fashion accessory for strolling on the Atlantic City boardwalk: “Foster Grant, Inc. History,” Funding Universe. http://www.fundinguniverse.com/company-histories/fostergrant-inc-history/

在大西洋城木板路上散步的时尚配饰：“Foster Grant, Inc. History,” Funding Universe。http://www.fundinguniverse.com/company-histories/fostergrant-inc-history/



a giant plastic-injection plant along the Nashua River: “Welcome to the Plastic City: Community Responses to the Leominster Autism Cluster,” dissertation by Martha E. Lang. Guilford College, Brown University, May 1998.

纳舒厄河畔的一座巨型注塑工厂：“Welcome to the Plastic City: Community Responses to the Leominster 孤独症 Cluster,” Martha E. Lang 的学位论文。吉尔福德学院，布朗大学，1998 年 5 月。



“the Plastic City”: Combing through Leominster’s History, Gilbert P. Tremblay. Leominster Historical Commission Book Committee, Office of the Mayor, 2006, pp. 145–74.

“塑料之城”：Combing through Leominster’s History, Gilbert P. Tremblay。莱明斯特历史委员会图书委员会，市长办公室，2006 年，第 145–74 页。



Local gardeners got used to PVC particles frosting their vegetable beds: Martha E. Lang. “Welcome to the Plastic City: Community Responses to the Leominster Autism Cluster,” dissertation, Guilford College, Brown University, May 1998.

当地园丁已习惯聚氯乙烯颗粒像霜一样覆盖在菜床上：Martha E. Lang。“Welcome to the Plastic City: Community Responses to the Leominster 孤独症 Cluster,” 学位论文，吉尔福德学院，布朗大学，1998 年 5 月。



The Altobellis were haunted: “Welcome to the Plastic City.”

阿尔托贝利一家被阴霾笼罩：“欢迎来到塑料之城。”



Jimmy Anderson was just four years old when he was diagnosed with a rare form of cancer: Anderson v. W. R. Grace: Background/About the Case, Seattle University School of Law. http://www.law.seattleu.edu/centers-and-institutes/films-for-justice-institute/lessons-from-woburn/about-the-case

吉米·安德森被诊断出患有罕见癌症时年仅四岁：安德森诉 W.R.格雷斯案：案件背景/案件概况，西雅图大学法学院。http://www.law.seattleu.edu/centers-and-institutes/films-for-justice-institute/lessons-from-woburn/about-the-case



at least one study in the literature: The Autistic Syndromes.

至少有一项文献研究：孤独谱系综合征。



thalidomide: “Autism in Thalidomide Embryopathy: A Population Study,” C. Gillberg et al. Developmental Medicine and Child Neurology, Vol. 36, Issue 4, No. 4, April 1994, pp. 351–56.

沙利度胺：《沙利度胺胚胎病中的孤独症：一项人群研究》，C. Gillberg 等人，《发育医学与儿童神经病学》，第 36 卷，第 4 期，1994 年 4 月，第 351–56 页。



Timothy Johnson, who had previously worked as a reporter for Channel 5 in Boston: David Ropeik, interview with the author.

“We begin with a report we believe will surprise the medical world”: “The Street Where They Lived.” 20/20, ABC News, March 13, 1992.

“我们首先播报一则我们认为将震惊医学界的报道”：《他们居住的街道》。20/20，ABC 新闻，1992 年 3 月 13 日。



Parents all over the country had contacted the network: “The Street Where They Lived,” Part 2. 20/20, ABC News, March 20, 1992.

全国各地的家长都联系了该电视台：《他们居住的街道》第二部分。20/20，ABC 新闻，1992 年 3 月 20 日。



Lori was defiant: Ibid.

洛里态度强硬：同上。



her graduate thesis at Brown University on the leadership of mothers: “Welcome to the Plastic City.”

她在布朗大学关于母亲领导力的硕士论文：“欢迎来到塑料城。”



six “quite clearly did not meet the criteria” for either autism or PDD-NOS: “Panel: Half of Leominster Autism Claims Verifiable,” Ralph Ranalli. Boston Herald, May 15, 1992.

“As a parent, your one job in life”: David Ropeik, interview with the author, 2013.

“作为父母，你一生中唯一的工作”：大卫·罗佩克，作者访谈，2013 年。



“It is not reasonable to believe that the population of [autistic] children has changed much”: “The Modern History of Autism,” p. 5.

(He called the PDD-NOS label “pseudoscientific” . . .): “Plain Talk About PDD and the Diagnosis of Autism,” Bernard Rimland. Autism Research Review International, Vol. 7, No. 2, 1993, p. 3.

（他将 PDD-NOS 这一标签称为“伪科学”……）：《关于 PDD 与孤独症诊断的直白讨论》，伯纳德·里姆兰。《孤独症研究评论国际版》，第 7 卷，第 2 期，1993 年，第 3 页。



a $75,000 check intended for Rimland from the producers of Rain Man: “Hoffman Couldn’t Retrieve Donation,” Rome News-Tribune, Aug. 13, 1997.

《雨人》制片人原本打算捐给里姆兰的一张 75,000 美元支票：《霍夫曼未能收回捐款》，《罗马新闻论坛报》，1997 年 8 月 13 日。



Rimland’s version of the events in the town: See, for example, Healing the New Childhood Epidemics: Autism, ADHD, Asthma, and Allergies, Kenneth Bock and Cameron Stauth. Ballantine Books, 2008.

the most “reactogenic” vaccine in the country’s history: The Panic Virus, Seth Mnookin. Simon & Schuster, 2011, p. 69.

该国历史上“反应原性最强”的疫苗：《恐慌病毒》，塞思·姆努金著。西蒙与舒斯特出版社，2011 年，第 69 页。



her two-and-a-half-year-old son, Christian: Testimony of Barbara Loe Fisher, U.S. House Government Reform Committee, Washington D.C., Aug, 3, 1999.

她两岁半的儿子克里斯蒂安：芭芭拉·洛·费舍尔在美国众议院政府改革委员会（华盛顿特区，1999 年 8 月 3 日）的证词。



a “bad lot” of vaccine: Statement by Barbara Loe Fisher, Institute of Medicine Immunization Safety Committee, National Academy of Sciences, Washington, D.C., Jan. 11, 2001.

the risks of pertussis (which had killed 7,500 children in 1934 alone, out of 265,000 cases): “Junk Science in the Courtroom,” Peter Huber. Forbes, July 8, 1991, p. 68.

Fisher, watching the broadcast, “felt betrayed”: Statement by Barbara Loe Fisher, Institute of Medicine Immunization Safety Committee, National Academy of Sciences, Washington, D.C., Jan. 11, 2001.

In truth, Thompson, who was awarded an Emmy for “DPT: Vaccine Roulette,”: Excerpt, DPT: Vaccine Roulette, WRC-TV, producer Lea Thompson, 1982.

Pediatricians reported levels of fear: Ibid.

儿科医生报告称恐惧程度：同上。



members of Congress were besieged: “State Defends Vaccine,” Elsa Walsh. Washington Post, June 30, 1982.

never took a single course in biology, physiology, or chemistry: “Coincidental Man: An Interview with Harris Livermore Coulter.” Greg Bedayn and Julian Winston. The American Homeopath, Vol. 2, 1995.

从未修过任何生物学、生理学或化学课程：《巧合之人：哈里斯·利弗莫尔·库尔特访谈录》。格雷格·贝丹与朱利安·温斯顿合著。《美国顺势疗法》杂志，第 2 卷，1995 年。

翻译克里姆林宫的官方声明：《书评：论决议——苏联共产党历史与政治在官方文件中的反映》，哈里斯·库尔特与罗伯特·埃勒斯编。约翰·S·雷舍塔尔著。《斯拉夫评论》杂志，第 35 卷，第 2 期，1976 年 6 月，第 321–25 页。



“worked like magic”: “Harris Coulter Interview: History, Vaccinations, and ‘Mongrel Prescribing,’” William Berno. Conducted on the Homeopathy at Sea cruise, Oct. 1995.

“效果神奇”：《哈里斯·库尔特访谈：历史、疫苗接种与“杂合处方”》，威廉·伯诺著。1995 年 10 月于“海上顺势疗法”邮轮上进行的访谈。



persuaded his graduate advisor: “An Interview with Harris Livermore Coulter.”

说服了他的研究生导师：《哈里斯·利弗莫尔·库尔特访谈录》。



“the gay lifestyle”: AIDS and Syphilis: The Hidden Link, Harris L. Coulter. North Atlantic Books, 1987.

“同性恋生活方式”：艾滋病与梅毒：隐藏的联系，哈里斯·L·库尔特著。北亚特兰蒂斯图书，1987 年。



Rimland was at home watching a talk show: “Children’s Shots: No Longer a Simple Decision,” Bernard Rimland. ARRI Newsletter, Vol. 9, No. 1, 1995.

several of the patients died anyway: “VG-1000—A Therapeutic Vaccine for Cancer,” Harris Coulter, Valentin Govallo, et al. Potentiating Health and the Crisis of the Immune System, Springer, 1997, pp. 199–205.

部分患者最终仍不幸去世：“VG-1000——一种癌症治疗性疫苗”，哈里斯·库尔特、瓦伦丁·戈瓦洛等著。《增强健康与免疫系统危机》，斯普林格出版社，1997 年，第 199–205 页。



trying to shed its image as a backwater: In his book Callous Disregard, Wakefield described the medical school as having been “becalmed in the academic doldrums for some years.” Callous Disregard, Andrew Wakefield. Skyhorse, 2010.

“Our study suggests that exposure to measles virus in utero”: “Crohn’s Disease After In-Utero Measles Virus Exposure,” Dr Anders Ekbom, Peter Daszak, Wolfgang Kraaz, Andrew J. Wakefield. Lancet, Vol. 348, No. 9026, Aug. 1996, pp. 515–17.

“我们的研究表明，子宫内接触麻疹病毒与克罗恩病存在关联”：《子宫内接触麻疹病毒后的克罗恩病》，安德斯·埃克博姆博士、彼得·达萨克、沃尔夫冈·克拉兹、安德鲁·J·韦克菲尔德。《柳叶刀》，第 348 卷，第 9026 期，1996 年 8 月，第 515–17 页。



(The World Health Organization estimates that in 2000 alone . . .): “The Clinical Significance of Measles: A Review,” Walter A. Orenstein. Journal of Infectious Diseases, Vol. 189, Suppl. 1, 2004, pp. S4–S16.

（世界卫生组织估计，仅 2000 年一年……）：《麻疹的临床意义：综述》，沃尔特·A·奥伦斯坦。《传染病杂志》，第 189 卷，增刊 1，2004 年，第 S4–S16 页。



Wakefield’s dean at the medical school, Arie Zuckerman: Vaccine: The Debate in Modern America, Mark A. Largent. Johns Hopkins University Press, 2012, pp. 102–103.

韦克菲尔德在医学院的院长，阿里·祖克曼：《疫苗：美国的争议》，马克·A·拉金特。约翰霍普金斯大学出版社，2012 年，第 102–103 页。



“I didn’t know anything about autism”: “Dr. Andrew Wakefield—In His Own Words,” Alan Golding, Apr. 2010.

这位母亲解释说，她的儿子有严重的肠道问题：“安德鲁·韦克菲尔德博士谈孤独症/疫苗争议及其持续遭受的职业迫害”，安东尼·怀尔，《每日电讯报》，2010 年 5 月 30 日。



In cautious and qualified language, his team reported: “Ileal-Lymphoid-Nodular Hyperplasia, Non-Specific Colitis, and Pervasive Developmental Disorder in Children,” Andrew Wakefield et al. Lancet, Vol. 351, No. 9103, Feb. 28, 1998.

他的团队以谨慎且有所保留的语言报告称：“儿童回肠淋巴结节增生、非特异性结肠炎与广泛性发育障碍”，安德鲁·韦克菲尔德等人，《柳叶刀》，第 351 卷，第 9103 期，1998 年 2 月 28 日。

在早期草稿的同行评审员表达担忧之后：“疫苗-孤独症骗局的惊人历史”，塞思·姆努金，《每日野兽》，2011 年 1 月 13 日。http://www.thedailybeast.com/articles/2011/01/13/mmr-vaccine-scare-andrew-wakefields-fraudulent-study.html



“We did not prove an association between measles, mumps, and rubella vaccine”: “Ileal-Lymphoid-Nodular Hyperplasia, Non-Specific Colitis, and Pervasive Developmental Disorder in Children.”

A formidably built man with deep-set blue eyes and a crisp, no-nonsense manner: “The Crash and Burn of an Autism Guru,” Susan Dominus. New York Times, Apr. 20, 2011.

一位体格魁梧、深陷蓝眸、作风干脆利落的男子：“《一位孤独症大师的崩溃与陨落》”，苏珊·多米努斯著。《纽约时报》，2011 年 4 月 20 日。

他在宣传视频中同样发出了不祥的论调：转录自“《皇家自由医院协助攻击 MMR 疫苗，医学院单剂注射录像带》”，布莱恩·迪尔著。http://briandeer.com/wakefield/royal-video.htm



Rimland thundered in a press release: “Parent Groups and Vaccine Policymakers Clash over Research into Vaccines, Autism and Intestinal Disorders,” PR Newswire, March 3, 1998.

里姆兰在一份新闻稿中怒斥：“《家长团体与疫苗政策制定者就疫苗、孤独症及肠道疾病研究发生冲突》”，美通社，1998 年 3 月 3 日。



no impact on rising rates of autism diagnosis: “Thimerosal and the Occurrence of Autism: Negative Ecological Evidence from Danish Population-Based Data,” K. M. Madsen et al. Pediatrics, Vol. 112, 2003, pp. 604–606.

对孤独症诊断率上升无影响：“《硫柳汞与孤独症的发生：基于丹麦人口数据的阴性生态学证据》”，K. M. 马德森等人著。《儿科学》，第 112 卷，2003 年，第 604–606 页。



News of the link between autism and vaccines spread: “Anti-Vaccine Activists, Web 2.0, and the Postmodern Paradigm—An Overview of Tactics and Tropes Used Online by the Anti-Vaccination Movement,” Anna Kata. Vaccine, 2011.

孤独症与疫苗关联的消息传播开来：“反疫苗活动人士、Web 2.0 与后现代范式——反疫苗运动在线使用的策略与修辞概述”，安娜·卡塔，《疫苗》，2011 年。



stoked by an endless stream of “balanced” stories: “Sticking with the Truth,” Curtis Brainard. Columbia Journalism Review, May 1, 2013.

被源源不断的“平衡”报道所煽动：“坚持真相”，柯蒂斯·布雷纳德，《哥伦比亚新闻学评论》，2013 年 5 月 1 日。



Similarly, some parents began hosting “pox parties”: “What to Do if You Get Invited to a Chickenpox Party,” Melinda Wenner Moyer. Slate, Nov. 15, 2013. http://www.slate.com/articles/double_x/the_kids/2013/11/chickenpox_vaccine_is_it_really_necessary.html

one of the most widely and thoroughly refuted: “The Crash and Burn of an Autism Guru.”

被最广泛、最彻底驳斥的观点之一：“一位孤独症专家的崩溃与陨落”。



“If my son really is Patient 11”: “Exposed: Andrew Wakefield and the MMR-Autism Fraud,” Brian Deer. http://briandeer.com/mmr/lancet-summary.htm

“如果我儿子真的是第 11 号病人”：《曝光：安德鲁·韦克菲尔德与 MMR-孤独症骗局》，布莱恩·迪尔。http://briandeer.com/mmr/lancet-summary.htm



ten of the study’s co-authors took their names off the paper: “Controversial MMR and Autism Study Retracted,” Maggie McKee. New Scientist, March 4, 2004.

该研究的十位合著者从论文中撤回了署名：《争议中的 MMR 与孤独症研究被撤回》，玛吉·麦基。《新科学家》，2004 年 3 月 4 日。

对十几项流行病学研究的系统性荟萃分析：《孤独谱系障碍与麻疹、腮腺炎、风疹疫苗的关联：当前流行病学证据的系统综述》，库马南·威尔逊等人。《儿科学与青少年医学档案》，第 157 卷，第 7 期，2003 年 7 月，第 628-63 页。



“It’s a question of diagnosis”: Lorna Wing and Judith Gould, interview with the author, 2011.

“这是一个诊断问题”：洛娜·温与朱迪思·古尔德，作者访谈，2011 年。



CHAPTER 11. IN AUTISTIC SPACE

第 11 章 在孤独谱系的空间中



“I am a 44-year-old autistic woman”: “An Inside View of Autism,” Temple Grandin. High-Functioning Individuals with Autism, Eric Schopler and Gary Mesibov, eds. Plenum Press, 1992, pp. 105–125.

“我是一名 44 岁的孤独谱系女性”：《孤独症的内在视角》，坦普尔·葛兰汀。收录于《高功能孤独谱系个体》，埃里克·肖普勒与加里·梅西博夫编，Plenum 出版社，1992 年，第 105–125 页。



“If I’d known then what I know now”: Ruth Christ Sullivan, interview with the author, 2013.

“如果当时我知道现在所了解的”：露丝·克里斯·沙利文，作者访谈，2013 年。



“suddenly the whole room got quiet”: Temple Grandin, interview with the author, 2014.

“突然间整个房间都安静了下来”：坦普尔·葛兰汀，2014 年作者访谈。



a shy engineer: “In the Spotlight: Tony and Temple,” Tony Attwood. Autism Asperger’s Digest, Jan.–Feb. 2000. http://www.fenichel.com/Temple-Tony.html

一位害羞的工程师：《聚焦：托尼与坦普尔》，托尼·阿特伍德。《孤独症与阿斯伯格综合征文摘》，2000 年 1-2 月刊。http://www.fenichel.com/Temple-Tony.html



(“We don’t think we’re a cow or something, do we?” . . . ): Emergence: Labeled Autistic, Temple Grandin. Arena Press, 1986, p. 91.

（“我们不会觉得自己是头牛或别的什么，对吧？”……）：《破茧而出：被贴上孤独谱系标签的我》，坦普尔·葛兰汀。竞技场出版社，1986 年，第 91 页。



“For the first time in my life”: Ibid.

“我人生中第一次”：同上。



“the first book written by a recovered autistic individual”: “Foreword,” Bernard Rimland. Emergence, p. 3.

“第一本由康复的孤独谱系人士撰写的书籍”：“前言”，伯纳德·里姆兰。《涌现》，第 3 页。



“I was doing a lot of construction projects”: Temple Grandin, interview with the author, 2014.

“我当时在参与许多建筑项目”：坦普尔·格兰丁，与作者的访谈，2014 年。



“Aware adults with autism”: “An Anthropologist on Mars,” Oliver Sacks. New Yorker, Dec. 27, 1993.

“有意识的孤独谱系成年人”：《火星上的人类学家》，奥利弗·萨克斯。《纽约客》，1993 年 12 月 27 日。



“The autistic mind, it was supposed at that time”: Ibid.

“当时人们认为，孤独谱系者的思维”：同上。



they had come to feel that their autism, “while it may be seen as a medical condition”: Ibid.

他们逐渐感到，自己的孤独症“虽然可能被视为一种医学状况”：同上。



a “sweet, calming” feeling: Ibid.

一种“甜美、平静”的感觉：同上。



in states where cattle are routinely treated badly: “Commentary: Behavior of Slaughter Plant and Auction Employees toward the Animals,” Temple Grandin. Anthrozoos, Vol. 1, No. 4, 1998, pp. 205–213.

在那些牛只经常受到虐待的州：“评论：屠宰场和拍卖场员工对待动物的行为”，坦普尔·葛兰汀，《人与动物》杂志，第 1 卷，第 4 期，1998 年，第 205–213 页。



“If I could snap my fingers and be non-autistic, I would not”: “An Anthropologist on Mars.”

“如果我能打个响指就变得不再孤独谱系，我不会这么做”：《火星上的人类学家》。



“a dead soul in a live body”: “The Real Scandal of the MMR Debate,” Walter Spitzer. Daily Mail, Dec. 20, 2001.

“行尸走肉”：沃尔特·斯皮策，《MMR 争议的真正丑闻》，《每日邮报》，2001 年 12 月 20 日。



“like stroke patients who have suffered brain damage”: “‘Odd Duck’ Behavior in Families Perhaps Caused by Brain Disorder,” Marilyn Dunlop. Toronto Star, Feb. 17, 1989.

“如同中风后脑损伤的患者”：玛丽莲·邓洛普，《家庭中的‘怪癖’行为或源于脑部失调》，《多伦多星报》，1989 年 2 月 17 日。



“It is the plague of those unable to feel”: “The Cruel, Heartless Victims of Asperger’s; Only Human,” Stephen Juan. Sydney Morning Herald, July 19, 1990.

“这是无法感受者的瘟疫”：斯蒂芬·胡安，《阿斯伯格综合征冷酷无情的受害者；仅属人类》，《悉尼先驱晨报》，1990 年 7 月 19 日。



“Earthworms were the first living creatures that I could identify with”: Jim Sinclair, interview with the author, 2013.

“蚯蚓是我能认同的第一种生物”：吉姆·辛克莱，2013 年接受作者采访。



a boy named Philip who suddenly stopped talking at age three: Run Wild, Run Free, David Rook. Dutton, 1967.

一个名叫菲利普的男孩在三岁时突然不再说话：《奔跑吧，自由奔跑》，大卫·鲁克著，达顿出版社，1967 年。



Susan and her husband, Marco, struggled for years: Susan Moreno, interview with the author, 2013.

苏珊和她的丈夫马可挣扎了多年：苏珊·莫雷诺，与作者的访谈，2013 年。



introduced the concept of the autistic continuum: “Manifestations of Social Problems in High-Functioning Autistic People,” Lorna Wing. High-Functioning Individuals with Autism, Eric Schopler and Gary Mesibov, eds. Plenum Press, 1992, pp. 129–41.

引入了孤独谱系连续体的概念：《高功能孤独谱系群体中的社交问题表现》，洛娜·温著。《高功能孤独症个体》，埃里克·肖普勒与加里·梅西博夫编，普莱纽姆出版社，1992 年，第 129–141 页。



she was turned down for disability benefits: “Autistic Adulthood: A Challenging Journey,” Anne Carpenter. High-Functioning Individuals with Autism, Eric Schopler and Gary Mesibov, eds. Plenum Press, 1992, pp. 289–94.

她申请残障补助被拒：《孤独谱系成年期：一段充满挑战的旅程》，安妮·卡彭特著。《高功能孤独症个体》，埃里克·肖普勒与加里·梅西博夫编，普莱纽姆出版社，1992 年，第 289–294 页。



“Being autistic does not mean being inhuman”: “Bridging the Gaps: An Inside-Out View of Autism (Or, Do You Know What I Don’t Know?),” Jim Sinclair. High-Functioning Individuals with Autism, Eric Schopler and Gary Mesibov, eds. Plenum Press, 1992, pp. 289–94.

“孤独谱系并不意味着不人道”：《架起桥梁：从内向外看孤独症（或者，你知道我不知道什么吗？）》，吉姆·辛克莱。《高功能孤独症个体》，埃里克·肖普勒与加里·梅西博夫编，Plenum 出版社，1992 年，第 289–94 页。



“If normal is being selfish, being dishonest”: “Insider’s Point of View,” Kathy Lissner. High-Functioning Individuals with Autism, Eric Schopler and Gary Mesibov, eds. Plenum Press, 1992, pp. 303–6.

“如果正常意味着自私、不诚实”：《内部视角》，凯西·利斯纳。《高功能孤独症个体》，埃里克·肖普勒与加里·梅西博夫编，Plenum 出版社，1992 年，第 303–6 页。



“subsided with time”: “A World of Her Own,” Daniel Goleman. New York Times, Feb. 21, 1993.

“随时间消退”：《她自己的世界》，丹尼尔·戈尔曼。《纽约时报》，1993 年 2 月 21 日。



“Being autistic, I’m not supposed to understand things like this”: “Social Uses of Fixations,” Jim Sinclair. Our Voice, Vol. 1, No. 1, 1992.

“作为孤独谱系人士，我不应该理解这类事情”：《固着的社交用途》，吉姆·辛克莱。《我们的声音》，第 1 卷，第 1 期，1992 年。



“Together we felt like a lost tribe”: Somebody Somewhere, Donna Williams. Three Rivers Press, 1994, p. 186.

“我们在一起就像失落的部落”：Somebody Somewhere，唐娜·威廉姆斯。三河出版社，1994 年，第 186 页。



“autistic space”: “Autism Network International: The Development of a Community and Its Culture,” Jim Sinclair. 2005. http://www.autreat.com/History_of_ANI.html

“孤独谱系空间”：“孤独症网络国际：一个社群及其文化的发展”，吉姆·辛克莱。2005 年。http://www.autreat.com/History_of_ANI.html



Its founder, Ray Kopp, was the father of a legally blind girl named Shawna: “My Affiliation with Autism,” Ray Kopp. http://www.syr.edu/~rjkopp/data/history.html, accessed through archive.org

其创始人雷·科普普是一位名叫肖娜的法定失明女孩的父亲：“我与孤独症的关系”，雷·科普普。http://www.syr.edu/~rjkopp/data/history.html，通过 archive.org 访问



Kopp launched the list in 1992: Autism List FAQ. Archived at http://kildall.apana.org.au/autism/autismlistfaq.html

科普普于 1992 年创建了该邮件列表：孤独症列表常见问题解答。存档于 http://kildall.apana.org.au/autism/autismlistfaq.html



neurotypical: “Neural connections in Toronto,” Steve Cousins. Our Voice, Vol. 1, No. 3, 1993.

神经典型者：“多伦多的神经连接”，史蒂夫·卡曾斯。《我们的声音》，第 1 卷，第 3 期，1993 年。



“Neurotypical syndrome is a neurobiological disorder”: Institute for the Study of the Neurologically Typical. Muskie, 1998. http://isnt.autistics.org/

“神经典型综合征是一种神经生物学障碍”：神经典型者研究学会。马斯奇，1998 年。http://isnt.autistics.org/



“Saying ‘person with autism’ suggests that autism is something bad”: “Why I Dislike Person-First Language,” Jim Sinclair. Autism Network International, 1999.

“说‘孤独症患者’暗示孤独症是坏事”：“为何我反感‘人先语言’”，吉姆·辛克莱。孤独症网络国际，1999 年。



“Autistic people seem to have an affinity with computers”: Carolyn Baird, interviewed by Wouter Schenk, Jan. 8, 1998. https://web.archive.org/web/19990128120401/http://web.syr.edu/~rjkopp/data/casinter.html

“孤独谱系群体似乎对电脑有亲和力”：卡罗琳·贝尔德，由沃特·申克采访，1998 年 1 月 8 日。https://web.archive.org/web/19990128120401/http://web.syr.edu/~rjkopp/data/casinter.html



At a conference in St. Louis: “Autism Network International: The Development of a Community and Its Culture.”

在圣路易斯的一场会议上：“孤独症网络国际：一个社群及其文化的发展”



a presentation on the challenges of raising her daughter, Beth: “A Parent’s View of More Able Individuals with Autism,” Susan Moreno. High-Functioning Individuals with Autism, Gary Mesibov and Eric Schopler, eds., Plenum Press, 1992.

关于抚养女儿贝丝所面临挑战的演讲：“一位家长对能力较强的孤独症个体的看法”，苏珊·莫雷诺。《高功能孤独症个体》，加里·梅西博夫与埃里克·肖普勒合编，Plenum 出版社，1992 年。



“It is as if the child they have dreamed about suddenly is missing”: Ibid.

“仿佛他们梦寐以求的孩子突然消失了”：同上。



“Parents, all parents, attach to their children through dreams”: “The Impact of Childhood Disability: The Parents’ Struggle,” Kenneth Moses. Ways Magazine, Spring 1987.

“父母，所有父母，都是通过梦想与孩子建立联结”：《童年残障的影响：父母的挣扎》，肯尼斯·摩西。《方式》杂志，1987 年春季刊。



“After 10 years in the field, I had an impaired child”: ”Handicapping Conditions, Family Dynamics, and Grief Counseling,” Kenneth Moses. Family Support Services: A Parent/Professional Partnership, Mary A. Slater and Patricia Mitchell, eds. National Clearinghouse of Rehabilitation Training Materials, 1984, p. 22.

“在领域内工作十年后，我有了一个残障孩子”：《残障状况、家庭动态与哀伤辅导》，肯尼斯·摩西著。《家庭支持服务：家长/专业伙伴关系》，玛丽·A·斯莱特与帕特里夏·米切尔编。国家康复培训材料交流中心，1984 年，第 22 页。



“There is a limit”: “Handicapping Conditions and the Interplay of the Family, Professionals, and Community,” Mary A Slater. In Family Support Services: A Parent/Professional Partnership, p. 9.

“存在一个限度”：《残障状况与家庭、专业人士及社区的相互作用》，玛丽·A·斯莱特著。载于《家庭支持服务：家长/专业伙伴关系》，第 9 页。



“I waited five years before my daughter ever looked at me”: “A Parent’s View of More Able Individuals with Autism.”

“我等了五年，女儿才第一次看向我”：《一位家长对高功能孤独症个体的看法》。



Lorna Wing published an article on the potential impact of the spectrum: “The Definition and Prevalence of Autism: A Review,” Lorna Wing. European Child and Adolescent Psychiatry, Vol. 2, No. 2, Jan. 1993, pp. 61–74.

洛娜·温发表了一篇关于孤独谱系潜在影响的文章：《孤独症的定义与患病率：综述》，洛娜·温著。《欧洲儿童与青少年精神病学》，第 2 卷第 2 期，1993 年 1 月，第 61-74 页。



Sola Shelly, a researcher and mother of an autistic son: “Who Says Autism’s a Disease?” Limor Gal. Haaretz, June 28, 2007.

索拉·谢利，一位研究者，也是一名孤独谱系儿子的母亲：“谁说孤独症是一种疾病？”利莫尔·加尔，《国土报》，2007 年 6 月 28 日。



“a way of being”: “Don’t Mourn for Us,” Jim Sinclair. Our Voice, Vol. 1, No. 3, 1993.

“一种存在方式”：“不要为我们哀悼”，吉姆·辛克莱，《我们的声音》，第 1 卷，第 3 期，1993 年。



“This is what we hear when you mourn over our existence”: Ibid.

“这就是我们听到你们为我们的存在哀悼时的感受”：同上。



“I learned more about my son by talking to those people for an hour”: Connie Deming, interview with the author, 2014.

“我和那些人谈了一个小时，对我儿子的了解比以往更多”：康妮·戴明，作者访谈，2014 年。



name-tag labels similar to Autreat (“autistic retreat”) green badges: “My Pro-Tips for YAPC First-Comers.” http://techblog.babyl.ca/entry/yapc-tips

类似 Autreat（“孤独谱系人士静修会”）绿色徽章的名牌标签：“我给 YAPC 新人的小贴士。” http://techblog.babyl.ca/entry/yapc-tips



the late photographer Dan Asher: Dan Asher’s attendance at Autreat 1996 is mentioned in Elijah’s Cup: A Family’s Journey into the Community and Culture of High-Functioning Autism and Asperger’s Syndrome, Valerie Paradiz. Kingsley, 2005. His art and history are discussed in “Dan Asher by Ben Berlow,” Ben Berlow. BOMB, No. 112, Summer 2010.

已故摄影师丹·阿舍：丹·阿舍参加 1996 年 Autreat 一事在《以利亚的杯子：一个家庭走进高功能孤独症与阿斯伯格综合征社区文化之旅》（瓦莱丽·帕拉迪兹著，Kingsley 出版社，2005 年）中被提及。他的艺术与生平在《本·伯洛谈丹·阿舍》（本·伯洛著，《BOMB》杂志，第 112 期，2010 年夏季刊）中有所讨论。



“It was immediately clear to me”: Elijah’s Cup, p. 137.

“我立刻就明白了”：出自《以利亚的杯子》，第 137 页。



“Each was a star in the sky”: Ibid., p. 138.

“每颗都是夜空中的星”：同上，第 138 页。



Projekt Empowerment in Sweden: “Mapping the Social Geographies of Autism—Online and Off-Line Narratives of Neuro-Shared and Separate Spaces,” Hanna Bertilsdotter Rosqvist, Charlotte Brownlow, and Lindsay O’Dell. Disability & Society, Vol. 28, Issue 3, 2013.

瑞典的赋权项目：“绘制孤独症的社会地理——线上与线下神经共享与分离空间的叙事”，作者：Hanna Bertilsdotter Rosqvist、Charlotte Brownlow 和 Lindsay O’Dell。《残障与社会》，第 28 卷，第 3 期，2013 年。



she had been given a thought-provoking assignment by her rabbi: Judy Singer, personal communication, 2013.

她的拉比给她布置了一项发人深省的任务：Judy Singer，个人通讯，2013 年。



“rigged in favor of Omniscience”: Ibid.

“为全知者操纵的体系”：同上。



Her mother’s odd behavior: “Why Can’t You Be Normal for Once in Your Life?” Judy Singer. Disability Discourse, Marian Corker and Sally French, eds. Open University Press, 1999.

她母亲的古怪行为：“为什么你就不能正常一次？”Judy Singer。《残障话语》，Marian Corker 和 Sally French 编。Open University Press，1999 年。



“Just how handicapping the limitations of disability become”: Disability: Whose Handicap? Ann Shearer. Blackwell, 1981, p. 61.

“残障的限制究竟有多大的阻碍”：《残障：谁的障碍？》，安·希勒著，布莱克威尔出版社，1981 年，第 61 页。



Many of the regular posters were women: “On Our Own Terms: Emerging Autistic Culture,” Martijn Dekker. Self-published, 2000. http://web.archive.org/web/20000928205753/http://trainland.tripod.com/martijn.htm

许多常发帖的用户是女性：《按我们自己的方式：新兴的孤独谱系文化》，马丁·德克尔著，自出版，2000 年。http://web.archive.org/web/20000928205753/http://trainland.tripod.com/martijn.htm



“The impact of the Internet on autistics”: “Autistics Are Communicating in Cyberspace,” Harvey Blume. New York Times, June 30, 1997.

“互联网对孤独谱系人士的影响”：《孤独谱系人士在网络空间交流》，哈维·布鲁姆著，《纽约时报》，1997 年 6 月 30 日。



“I was interested in the liberatory, activist aspects of it”: “The Autism Rights Movement,” Andrew Solomon. New York, May 25, 2008.

“我对其中的解放性和行动主义方面感兴趣”：《孤独症权利运动》，安德鲁·所罗门著，《纽约》杂志，2008 年 5 月 25 日。



Think back over all those “odd people out”: “Odd People In: The Birth of Community amongst People on the ‘Autistic Spectrum,’” Judy Singer. Bachelor’s thesis, Faculty of Humanities and Social Science, University of Technology, Sydney, 1998.

回想一下那些“格格不入的人”：《格格不入的人：孤独谱系人群中的社群诞生》，朱迪·辛格著。悉尼科技大学人文与社会科学学院学士论文，1998 年。



“NT is only one kind of brain wiring”: “Neurodiversity: On the Neurological Underpinnings of Geekdom,” Harvey Blume. Atlantic, Sept. 1998.

“神经典型只是大脑连接方式的一种”：《神经多样性：论极客的神经学基础》，哈维·布鲁姆著。《大西洋月刊》，1998 年 9 月。



They were both digital natives: Alex Plank and Dan Grover, interviews with the author, 2012.

他们都是数字原住民：亚历克斯·普兰克和丹·格罗弗，作者访谈，2012 年。



Plank contributed dozens of articles: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/User:AlexPlank

普兰克贡献了数十篇文章：http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/User:AlexPlank



“I met a kid there my age”: Alex Plank, interview with the author, 2012.

“我在那里遇到了一个同龄的孩子”：亚历克斯·普兰克，2012 年作者访谈。



an online press release: “Autistic Teens Create Website for People with Asperger’s Syndrome,” Alex Plank and Dan Grover, PRWeb, July 1, 2004.

一篇在线新闻稿：“孤独谱系青少年为阿斯伯格综合征患者创建网站”，亚历克斯·普兰克和丹·格罗弗，PRWeb，2004 年 7 月 1 日。



his interactive sheet music app, Etude: “Steinway & Sons Debuts Etude 2.0 iPad App for Learning and Playing Piano.” Press release, Sept. 15, 2011.

他的互动乐谱应用《练习曲》：“施坦威父子推出用于学习和弹奏钢琴的《练习曲》2.0 iPad 应用。”新闻稿，2011 年 9 月 15 日。



Plank’s interview with Bram Cohen: “Asperger’s Interviews: The Creator of BitTorrent,” Alex Plank. http://wrongplanet.net/new-wrongplanet-net-aspergers-interviews-the-creator-of-bittorrent/

普兰克对布拉姆·科恩的访谈：“阿斯伯格访谈：BitTorrent 的创造者”，亚历克斯·普兰克。http://wrongplanet.net/new-wrongplanet-net-aspergers-interviews-the-creator-of-bittorrent/



a third of all Internet traffic in the United States: “The ‘One Third of All Internet Traffic’ Myth,” Ernesto. TorrentFreak. http://torrentfreak.com/bittorrent-the-one-third-of-all-internet-traffic-myth/

美国互联网流量的三分之一：“‘三分之一互联网流量’的迷思”，埃内斯托。《TorrentFreak》。http://torrentfreak.com/bittorrent-the-one-third-of-all-internet-traffic-myth/



“We have your son”: “The Autism Rights Movement,” Andrew Solomon. New York, May 25, 2008.

“我们抓了你儿子”：“孤独症权利运动”，安德鲁·所罗门。《纽约杂志》，2008 年 5 月 25 日。



the PR powerhouse that inspired Mad Men: “Matthew Weiner’s No Madman,” Kamau High. AdWeek, July 30, 2007. http://www.adweek.com/news/advertising/matthew-weiners-no-madman-89728

启发《广告狂人》的公关巨头：“马修·韦纳并非狂人”，卡毛·海伊。《AdWeek》，2007 年 7 月 30 日。http://www.adweek.com/news/advertising/matthew-weiners-no-madman-89728



(Indeed, BBDO had done similar work for Autism Speaks.): “When PSAs Work: Autism Speaks,” Suzanne and Bob Wright. Advertising Age, June 17, 2009.

（事实上，BBDO 曾为孤独症之声做过类似工作。）：“当公益广告奏效时：孤独症之声”，苏珊娜与鲍勃·赖特。《广告时代》，2009 年 6 月 17 日。



In the words of the center’s press release: “Millions of Children Held Hostage by Psychiatric Disorders.” Business Wire, Dec. 3, 2007.

该中心新闻稿称：“数百万儿童被精神疾病挟持为人质。” ——《商业连线》，2007 年 12 月 3 日。



“It’s like with AIDS”: “Campaign on Childhood Mental Illness Succeeds at Being Provocative,” Joanne Kaufman. New York Times, Dec. 14, 2007.

“就像艾滋病一样”：“儿童精神疾病宣传活动成功引发争议”，乔安妮·考夫曼，《纽约时报》，2007 年 12 月 14 日。



He boasted to reporters that traffic to the Child Study Center’s website had doubled: “Ads about Kids’ Mental Health Problems Draw Fire,” Shirley Wang. Wall Street Journal, Dec. 14, 2007.

他向记者吹嘘，儿童研究中心的网站访问量翻了一番：“关于儿童心理健康问题的广告引发争议”，雪莉·王，《华尔街日报》，2007 年 12 月 14 日。



the ads would soon be running in other cities: “Ads Anger Parents of Autistic Children.” UPI. Dec. 14, 2007.

这些广告很快将在其他城市投放：“广告激怒孤独谱系儿童家长”，合众国际社，2007 年 12 月 14 日。



“Suddenly I went from being someone that people believed had a lot of potential”: Ari Ne’eman, interview with the author, 2012.

“突然间，我从一个被人们认为潜力无限的人变成了这样”：阿里·内曼，作者访谈，2012 年。



“We’ve tried cripples before and it doesn’t work”: “An Elegant Tribute,” Eve Kushner. Monthly, March 2009. http://themonthly.com/feature-03-09.html

“我们以前试过让残障人士参与，但行不通”：《优雅的致敬》，伊芙·库什纳。《月刊》，2009 年 3 月。http://themonthly.com/feature-03-09.html



the first on-campus self-advocacy group for disabled students: “The Rolling Quads,” Rebecca Klumpp. Disability Bible, Apr. 2013. http://www.disabilitybible.com/disability-bible-listing/the-rolling-quads

首个面向残障学生的校园自我倡导团体：《滚动的四边形》，丽贝卡·克伦普。《残障圣经》，2013 年 4 月。http://www.disabilitybible.com/disability-bible-listing/the-rolling-quads



the seminal law that banned discrimination: “Fact Sheet: Your Rights Under Section 504 of the Rehabilitation Act,” U.S. Department of Health and Human Services, revised June 2006. http://www.hhs.gov/ocr/civilrights/resources/factsheets/504.pdf

禁止歧视的开创性法律：《事实说明：你在《康复法案》第 504 条下的权利》，美国卫生与公众服务部，2006 年 6 月修订。http://www.hhs.gov/ocr/civilrights/resources/factsheets/504.pdf



didn’t want anything to do with the word disability: “‘It Is Not a Disease, It Is a Way of Life,’” Emine Saner. Guardian, Aug. 6, 2007.

不愿与“残障”一词有任何关联：“‘这不是一种疾病，而是一种生活方式。’”——埃米娜·萨纳，《卫报》，2007 年 8 月 6 日。



appearances by Hillary Clinton and CBS Evening News anchor Katie Couric: “NYU Child Study Center Raises $9 Million and Celebrates 10th Anniversary.” Press release, NYU Child Study Center, Dec. 5, 2007.

希拉里·克林顿与 CBS 晚间新闻主播凯蒂·库里克出席活动：“纽约大学儿童研究中心筹集 900 万美元并庆祝成立十周年。”新闻稿，纽约大学儿童研究中心，2007 年 12 月 5 日。



ASAN blasted out an action alert: “An Urgent Call to Action: Tell NYU Child Study Center to Abandon Stereotypes against People with Disabilities.” Press release, ASAN, Dec. 8, 2007.

ASAN 紧急发布行动呼吁：“紧急行动呼吁：要求纽约大学儿童研究中心摒弃对残障人士的刻板印象。”新闻稿，ASAN，2007 年 12 月 8 日。



“This is a ‘public awareness’ campaign”: “Rescue Me: The NYU Child Study Center’s Ransom Notes Ad Campaign,” Kristina Chew. Blisstree. Dec. 11, 2007. http://www.blisstree.com/2007/12/11/mental-health-well-being/rescue-me-the-nyu-child-study-centers-ransom-notes-ad-campaign/#ixzz3AgpNrbMn

“这是一项‘公众意识’宣传活动”：“救救我：纽约大学儿童研究中心的赎金纸条广告活动”，克里斯蒂娜·邱，Blisstree 网站，2007 年 12 月 11 日。http://www.blisstree.com/2007/12/11/mental-health-well-being/rescue-me-the-nyu-child-study-centers-ransom-notes-ad-campaign/#ixzz3AgpNrbMn



In 2014, when Obama issued an executive order: “Obama’s Wage Hike For Federal Contractors Won’t Apply to Disabled Workers,” Mike Elk. In These Times, Jan. 30, 2014. http://inthesetimes.com/working/entry/16205/obamas_wage_hike_for_federal_contractors_wont_apply_to_disabled_workers

2014 年，奥巴马发布了一项行政命令："奥巴马对联邦承包商的加薪政策不适用于残疾工人"，迈克·埃尔克，《在这些时代》，2014 年 1 月 30 日。http://inthesetimes.com/working/entry/16205/obamas_wage_hike_for_federal_contractors_wont_apply_to_disabled_workers



ASAN assembled a diverse coalition of organizations: “After Outcry, White House Extends $10.10 Minimum Wage to Some Disabled Workers,” Mike Elk. In These Times, Feb. 12, 2014. http://inthesetimes.com/working/entry/16263/in_a_reversal_white_house_extends_10.10_minimum_wage_boost_to_some_disabled.

孤独谱系自我倡导网络（ASAN）组建了一个多元化的组织联盟："在抗议声中，白宫将 10.10 美元最低工资扩展至部分残疾工人"，迈克·埃尔克，《在这些时代》，2014 年 2 月 12 日。http://inthesetimes.com/working/entry/16263/in_a_reversal_white_house_extends_10.10_minimum_wage_boost_to_some_disabled.



provided testimony to the United Nations Special Rapporteur on Torture: “Compliance is Unreasonable: The Human Rights Implications of Compliance-Based Behavioral Interventions under the Convention Against Torture and Convention on the Rights of Persons with Disabilities,” Lydia Brown, Torture in Healthcare Settings: Reflections on the Special Rapporteur on Torture’s Thematic Report, Center for Human Rights and Humanitarian Law, Washington College of Law, 2013.

向联合国酷刑问题特别报告员提交了证词："服从是不合理的：基于服从的行为干预在《禁止酷刑公约》和《残疾人权利公约》下的人权影响"，莉迪亚·布朗，《医疗环境中的酷刑：对酷刑问题特别报告员专题报告的反思》，人权与人道主义法中心，华盛顿法学院，2013 年。



“One of the cruelest tricks”: “Foreword,” Julia Bascom. Loud Hands: Autistic People, Speaking, Julia Bascom, ed. Autistic Self-Advocacy Network, 2012.

"最残忍的伎俩之一"：《前言》，朱莉娅·巴斯科姆，《响亮的声音：孤独谱系群体，口语者》，朱莉娅·巴斯科姆编，孤独谱系自我倡导网络，2012 年。



Zoe commented: Zoe Gross’s comment on “Identifying and Accepting Happy Autistic Kids on the Playground,” Shannon Rosa. Squidalicious. http://www.squidalicious.com/2012/04/identifying-accepting-happy-autistic.html

佐伊评论：佐伊·格罗斯在《识别并接纳操场上快乐的孤独谱系儿童》一文下的评论，作者香农·罗莎。Squidalicious 网站。http://www.squidalicious.com/2012/04/identifying-accepting-happy-autistic.html



CHAPTER 12. BUILDING THE ENTERPRISE: DESIGNS FOR A NEURODIVERSE WORLD

第 12 章 构建企业：面向神经多元世界的设计



There are roughly as many people on the spectrum: John Elder Robison, interview with the author, 2014.

谱系人群的数量大致相当：约翰·埃尔德·罗比森，2014 年与作者的访谈。



very old genes that are shared widely in the general population: “Most Genetic Risk for Autism Resides with Common Variation,” Trent Gaugler, Lambertus Klei, Stephan J. Sanders, et al. Nature Genetics, Vol. 46, 2014, pp. 881–85.

在普通人群中广泛共享的古老基因：《大多数孤独症遗传风险源于常见变异》，作者特伦特·高格勒、兰伯特斯·克莱、斯蒂芬·J·桑德斯等人。《自然遗传学》第 46 卷，2014 年，第 881–885 页。



“Many autistics, I believe, are suited for academic science”: “The Power of Autism,” Laurent Mottron. Nature, Vol. 479, Nov. 3, 2011.

“我相信，许多孤独症患者适合从事学术科研工作”：《孤独症的力量》，Laurent Mottron 著。《自然》杂志，第 479 卷，2011 年 11 月 3 日。
